name: 24"x 30" Scalloped Wall Mirror Natural Wood - Threshold™: Modern Style, Rectangle Shape, Wood Frame, Wall Mount
description:
Add instant glam to your home decor with this Scalloped Wall Mirror from Threshold™. This wall mirror features a clean rectangle frame with scalloped edges for a sleek, modern look that complements a variety of decor styles. Simply mount it on your living room or bedroom wall for versatile, functional and elegant display.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
